Defendant Delano Retail Partners Llc'S Motion To Modify Preliminary Injunction To Pay Legal Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DELANO RETAIL PARTNERS, LLC'S MOTION TO MODIFY PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION TO PAY LEGAL FEES AND COSTS.

APPEARANCES: Michael J. Stortz, Esq. of Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP 591-7500 for pltf & opposing party; Kurt Peterson, Esq. of Peterson Martin Reynolds LLP 399-2900 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as modified: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO MODIFY THE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS GRANTED IN PART. THE COURT ORDERS RELEASE OF $16,000. LITIGATION OF THIS CASE IS STAYED THROUGH AUGUST 30. After hearing, order signed, approved as to form. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF C&S WHOLESALE GROCERS, INC.'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Michael J. Stortz, Esq. & Lauren V. Fishman, Esq. of Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP 591-7500 for pltf & moving party; Kurt Peterson, Esq. of Peterson Martin Reynolds LLP 399-2900 for deft & opposing party Delano Retail Partners, LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION ENJOINING DEFENDANTS, THEIR EMPLOYEES, AGENTS AND ANY OTHER PERSONS ACTING ON THEIR BEHALF FROM SPENDING, TRANSFERRING, PLEDGING, ENCUMBERING OR OTHERWISE DIMINISHING $400,000.00 FUNDS CURRENTLY BEING HELD BY THEIR COUNSEL JOSEPH NERI IS GRANTED. Order signed in open court. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Plaintiff'S Order To Show Cause To Defendants Re: Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Feb-08-2011 Continued To Feb-16-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF C&S WHOLESALE GROCERS, INC.'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION.

APPEARANCES: Michael J. Stortz, Esq. & Lauren V. Fishman, Esq. of Drinker Biddle & Reath LLP 591-7500 for pltf & moving party; Kurt Peterson, Esq. of Peterson Martin Reynolds LLP 399-2900 for deft & opposing party Delano Retail Partners, LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court continued the matter to 02/16/11 for defendant to respond to the declaration of Byron Lovell filed yesterday (02/07/11). Defendant's response due 02/14/11. Counsel indicated that plaintiff has agreed to 02/16/11.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
